title: UnstableSMP Orbital Strike Rods
description: This datapack recreates the orbital strike canon fishing rods from the unstable universe, which are used by wemmbumc.
body:
This datapack recreates the orbital strike canon fishing rods from the unstable universe, which are used by wemmbumc.

How to use:
1. Put the file in your datapack folder and type /reload
2. Type /trigger rod_stabshot or /trigger rod_nukeshot
3. Have fun

contact me if you have issues on discord: @prexxcel
